title: Luna Universal qPCR (NEB)
description: New England Biolabs dye-based 20 uL qPCR (M3003): 95 C activation, 40-45 cycles, with a 60-95 C melt curve.

payload.notes: Dye-based (intercalating) chemistry; run the melt curve (60 to 95 C; follow your instrument's melt recommendations) to confirm specificity. Primers 0.25 uM (250 nM) each final from a 10 uM stock; optimize between 100-500 nM if needed. Up to 100 ng template. 40 cycles for most targets; 45 cycles for very low-input samples. Read on the SYBR/FAM scan channel. Hot-start polymerase, so there is no need to keep reactions on ice or preheat the cycler. For 384-well plates use a 10 uL reaction (halve all volumes). Source: NEB Luna Universal qPCR Master Mix manual (M3003), https://www.neb.com/en/-/media/nebus/files/manuals/manualm3003.pdf
